comments: TV says Rush's latest album is the best he's heard from them for years.

He says he's a film freak and can watch anything up to 5 films on video over the weekends and he saw an exclusive viewing of Witches Of Eastwick last night in a cinema and thought it was a good film. Vance says the film will be released nationwide within 3 weeks time.

Vance plays a 1986 concert of W.A.S.P.'s performance in the Hammersmith Odeon after singer Blackie Lawless refused permission for the broadcast of their performance at this year's Donington's Monsters Of Rock, as he considered it poor.

track_listing.details: LP - At The Edge Of Damnation; Metalworks
LP - Raise Your Fist And Yell; MCA
LP - Take It Or Leave It; CBS
LP - Crest Of A Knave; Chrysalis
